summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kebab Hut La Rochelle admin system and frontend functionality. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Admin authentication, menu management, and homepage display all functional. Minor UI issue with modal overlay in admin panel.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts button clicks preventing form submission
ui_bugs.details: Dialog overlay blocks interaction with submit button. Need to use force=True or fix z-index/pointer-events

passed_tests: Backend API - User registration (200 status)
Backend API - User login (200 status)
Backend API - Get current user (200 status)
Backend API - Get menu items public endpoint (200 status)
Backend API - Get categories public endpoint (200 status)
Backend API - Initialize default menu (200 status)
Backend API - Create menu item (200 status)
Backend API - Update menu item (200 status)
Backend API - Delete menu item (200 status)
Backend API - Upload endpoint accessibility (422 expected)
Homepage loads with correct dark theme (#0D0D0D background)
Admin login page accessible at /admin
User registration flow working correctly
User login and redirect to /admin/dashboard working
Menu initialization creates 25 default items
25 menu items display correctly on homepage
All 6 category navigation buttons functional (Kebabs, Burgers, Tacos, Bowls, Frites, Boissons)
Phone buttons work correctly (tel:+33983510117) in header, hero, info sections
Directions buttons work correctly (Google Maps La Rochelle address)
Mobile responsive design working perfectly
Mobile menu toggle opens/closes correctly
Floating CTA button visible and functional on mobile

Popular items correctly marked with 'Populaire' badge
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue in admin dashboard add product dialog - button clicks are being intercepted by dialog overlay. Consider adding force=True to click handlers or adjusting z-index/pointer-events CSS.
